examples: To make up for the mediocrity, zealous parents send their kids to the expensive cram schools.
She was a zealous worker for charity.
But other European Banks were not so zealous.
Lavender's first boss at CBOT, Ray Cahnman, is now a zealous, outspoken screen trader.
Tall and bald with a hearty laugh, the retired interior designer is neither monkish nor zealous.
